testimonials.description: Over 1,000 five-star reviews from patients who experienced our services.
testimonials.review1Content: I am very satisfied with the implant service at the clinic. Dr. Chinh is very dedicated, with thorough consultation and professional execution. After treatment, I can chew comfortably like natural teeth.
testimonials.review2Content: Invisalign clear aligners here are truly wonderful. The treatment process was very comfortable, results exactly as expected. The doctor always monitors closely.
testimonials.review3Content: Dr. Chinh helped me achieve naturally beautiful, even teeth with porcelain veneers. Clean clinic, modern equipment. Very trustworthy!
testimonials.review4Content: Extracting an impacted wisdom tooth was not as painful as I imagined. Highly skilled doctor, gentle approach. Quick recovery. Thank you Dr. Chinh!
testimonials.review5Content: Getting porcelain crowns at Dr. Chinh's clinic was the best decision. Natural color, snug fit, comfortable eating. 10/10!

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.homeSubtitle: The most common questions from patients. If you can't find an answer, contact us directly!
faq.homeFaq1A: With modern anesthesia techniques, dental implant surgery is virtually painless. You may feel mild soreness after the anesthesia wears off, manageable with regular painkillers.
faq.homeFaq2Q: How long does orthodontic treatment take?
faq.homeFaq2A: Average orthodontic treatment takes 12-24 months, depending on the degree of misalignment, treatment method, and age. The doctor will advise specifically during the initial consultation.
faq.homeFaq3A: Yes. All services at the clinic come with clear warranty policies. Implants: 10-20 year warranty, porcelain crowns: 5-10 year warranty, orthodontics: 2-year result guarantee.
faq.homeFaq4Q: Does the clinic offer installment payment?
faq.homeFaq4A: Yes. The clinic offers 0% interest installments through multiple banks and e-wallets. Please contact us for suitable payment options.
faq.homeFaq5Q: Which clinics does the doctor work at?
faq.homeFaq5A: Dr. Ha Thi Chinh practices at 5 locations: DC Dental (Bat Trang), Ocean Dental (Vinhomes Ocean Park), Eco Dental (Ecopark), An Nam Dental (Van Giang), and Hai Duong Dental.

faqPage.metaDesc: Answers to common dental questions: Implants, orthodontics, veneers, costs, warranty, and treatment process.
faqPage.title: Frequently
faqPage.subtitle: Collection of common questions from patients. If you can't find your answer, contact us directly!
faqPage.noResults: No matching questions found. Please contact us for direct assistance.
faqPage.implantA1: With modern anesthesia techniques, the implant procedure is nearly painless. You may feel mild soreness after the anesthesia wears off, manageable with regular painkillers for 1-2 days.
faqPage.implantA2: Implants have a very long lifespan, typically 20-25 years or a lifetime with proper care. The restoration on top (porcelain crown) may need replacement after 10-15 years.
faqPage.implantQ3: Who should not get dental implants?
faqPage.implantA3: Contraindications include: uncontrolled diabetes, severe cardiovascular disease, ongoing jaw radiation therapy, excessive jaw bone loss. The doctor will evaluate each case during examination.
faqPage.orthoQ1: How long does orthodontic treatment take?
faqPage.orthoA1: Average treatment time is 12-24 months, depending on the degree of misalignment. Some mild cases can be completed in 6-12 months with Invisalign.
faqPage.orthoA2: Absolutely. Orthodontics has no age limit. Patients aged 30-50 still achieve excellent results, especially with clear Invisalign aligners.
faqPage.orthoQ3: How is Invisalign different from braces?
faqPage.orthoA3: Invisalign uses removable clear trays — more aesthetic, comfortable, and easy to clean. Traditional braces are better for complex cases and are more affordable.
faqPage.veneerQ1: Are porcelain veneers harmful to teeth?
faqPage.veneerA1: Veneers require only a very thin layer of enamel removal (0.3-0.5mm), without affecting the tooth structure. This method maximally preserves natural teeth.
faqPage.veneerQ2: How long do porcelain crowns last?
faqPage.veneerA2: High-quality porcelain (Emax, Zirconia) lasts 10-20 years. Porcelain veneers last 10-15 years with proper care.
faqPage.paymentQ1: Does the clinic offer installment payment?
faqPage.paymentA1: Yes. The clinic offers 0% interest installments through multiple banks and e-wallets. Flexible payment terms from 3 to 24 months.
faqPage.paymentA2: No. After examination and consultation, the doctor will provide a clear all-inclusive quote. No hidden fees or unexpected charges.
faqPage.warrantyA1: Implants: 10-20 year warranty, porcelain crowns: 5-10 year warranty, orthodontics: 2-year result guarantee. Warranty details are clearly stated in the treatment contract.
faqPage.ctaDesc: Book a free consultation and let the doctor answer your questions directly.

blogPage.metaDesc: Dental knowledge, latest medical news from Dr. Ha Thi Chinh. Continuously updated.
blogPage.title: Dental
blogPage.subtitle: Useful dental knowledge, the latest treatment trends.
blogPage.post1Title: Does Dental Implant Surgery Hurt? Reality from a Dentist
blogPage.post1Excerpt: Detailed answers about pain levels during implant surgery, modern anesthesia techniques.
blogPage.post2Excerpt: Comprehensive Invisalign pricing at reputable clinics.
blogPage.post3Title: What Are Porcelain Veneers? Who Should Get Them?
blogPage.post3Excerpt: Learn about cosmetic porcelain veneers: process, pros and cons, costs.
blogPage.post4Title: What is All-on-4? Full Jaw Restoration Solution
blogPage.post4Excerpt: All-on-4 technique restores an entire jaw with just 4 Implant posts.
blogPage.post5Excerpt: Comparing ceramic braces with other orthodontic methods.
blogPage.post6Title: Complete Guide to Proper Oral Care
blogPage.post6Excerpt: How to brush, use dental floss, and mouthwash effectively.

blogPost.ctaDesc: Book a free consultation to get detailed advice from our dentist about your oral health.
blogPost.post1Body1: Dental implant surgery involves placing a titanium post into the jawbone to replace a missing tooth. Many patients worry about pain levels during the procedure. In reality, with modern anesthesia techniques, implant surgery is nearly painless.
blogPost.post1Body2: During surgery, the dentist uses local anesthesia to ensure complete comfort. You may feel slight pressure but no pain. The procedure typically takes 30–60 minutes per implant post.
blogPost.post1Body3: After surgery, you may experience mild swelling and discomfort for 2–3 days. Your dentist will prescribe pain relievers and anti-inflammatory medication for quick recovery. Most patients can return to normal activities within 1–2 days.
blogPost.post1Body4: At Ths. Bs. Ha Thi Chinh's clinic, we use genuine implant systems from Korea and Switzerland, combined with 3D CT technology for precise surgical planning, minimizing invasiveness and patient discomfort.
blogPost.post2Body1: Invisalign is a modern orthodontic treatment using clear aligners instead of traditional braces. The cost of Invisalign depends on several factors including the severity of misalignment, type of aligner used, and the dentist's experience.
blogPost.post2Body2: Invisalign pricing in 2026 ranges from 60–120 million VND depending on the treatment plan. Invisalign Lite is suitable for mild cases, while Invisalign Comprehensive is designed for more complex cases requiring full correction.
blogPost.post2Body3: Compared to traditional braces, Invisalign offers superior aesthetics (nearly invisible), comfort, easier oral hygiene, and less pain. However, treatment effectiveness depends heavily on patient compliance — aligners must be worn at least 22 hours per day.
blogPost.post2Body4: Contact our clinic for a detailed consultation about the Invisalign cost that suits your dental condition. We offer 0% interest installment plans and warranty throughout the treatment period.
blogPost.post3Body1: Porcelain veneers are thin ceramic shells bonded to the front surface of teeth to improve color, shape, and size. This is a popular cosmetic solution for those seeking a perfect smile without significant tooth reduction.
blogPost.post3Body2: The veneer process typically takes 2–3 appointments. First visit: examination and treatment planning. Second visit: minimal tooth preparation (0.3–0.5mm) and impressions. Third visit: final veneer placement. The entire process is nearly painless.
blogPost.post3Body3: Veneers are ideal for people with stained, gapped, chipped, or uneven teeth. However, not everyone is suitable — those with severe teeth grinding or extensive decay need treatment before getting veneers.
blogPost.post3Body4: Porcelain veneers last 10–20 years with proper care. E-Max and Zirconia ceramics are the two most popular choices today, offering natural color and high durability.
blogPost.post4Body1: All-on-4 is an advanced implant technique that allows full jaw restoration with just 4 implant posts. This method is especially suitable for patients with complete tooth loss or severely damaged teeth requiring extraction.
blogPost.post4Body2: Key advantages of All-on-4 include fewer implant posts needed (compared to 6–8 traditional posts), shorter treatment time, and the ability to receive temporary teeth on the same day as surgery. Patients can eat soft food immediately after completion.
blogPost.post4Body3: All-on-4 costs range from 80–200 million VND per jaw depending on the implant system and restoration materials used. Our clinic offers flexible installment plans to support patients.
blogPost.post4Body4: At Ths. Bs. Ha Thi Chinh's clinic, the All-on-4 procedure is performed by specialist doctors with over 15 years of experience, supported by 3D CT technology and digital surgical planning software.
blogPost.post5Body1: Ceramic braces are an orthodontic method using brackets made from ceramic or composite material that matches tooth color, significantly reducing visibility compared to traditional metal braces.
blogPost.post5Body2: Compared to metal braces, ceramic braces are more aesthetic but cost about 20–30% more. Ceramic braces pricing in 2026 ranges from 35–55 million VND depending on case complexity.
blogPost.post5Body3: Treatment time for ceramic braces is typically 18–30 months, similar to metal braces. Patients need regular check-ups every 4–6 weeks for wire adjustments and treatment progress monitoring.
blogPost.post5Body4: Ceramic braces are ideal for adults and teenagers who want orthodontic treatment but care about aesthetics during the process. However, extra attention to hygiene is needed as ceramic brackets may discolor without proper care.
blogPost.post6Body1: Proper oral care is the foundation for maintaining healthy teeth and gums. The Dental Association recommends brushing at least twice daily, for a minimum of 2 minutes each time, using a soft-bristled toothbrush.
blogPost.post6Body2: Correct brushing technique: angle the brush at 45 degrees to the gum line, use gentle circular motions. Don't forget to brush the inner, outer, and chewing surfaces of all teeth. Replace your toothbrush every 3 months.
blogPost.post6Body3: Dental floss helps clean between teeth — where a toothbrush can't reach. Use dental floss at least once daily, ideally at night before brushing. Antibacterial mouthwash is an excellent supplementary step.
blogPost.post6Body4: Besides daily hygiene, visit your dentist for regular check-ups every 6 months. Professional scaling and early detection help prevent oral problems before they become serious.

privacyPage.metaDesc: Personal information privacy policy at Dr. Ha Thi Chinh's dental clinic.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.p1: We collect personal information when you:
privacyPage.li1a: Book an appointment via website or phone
privacyPage.li1b: Fill out an online consultation form
privacyPage.p1b: Information includes: Full name, phone number, email, oral health condition.
privacyPage.p3: We are committed to absolute confidentiality of your personal information and medical records. Information is only shared with your consent or by legal requirement.
privacyPage.p4: You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information at any time by contacting the clinic.
privacyPage.p5: For any privacy policy questions, please contact: 0906 150 389 or email contact@hathichinh.com.
